title: Netherite Lava
description: Think that Netherite Armor should give you Fire Protection? Look no further!
body:
**Mod also works with all of the Latest Snapshots!**

A Very Self-Explanatory Mod that gives you Fire Resistance when wearing Full Netherite Armor.
A slight downside is losing 1 Durability on each piece of Armor every 5 Seconds whilst burning!


If this Mod gets 50+ Downloads I will add a Config for the Mod that allows you to change or remove the Durability loss and do a NeoForge Version.
